description: Foundation & Auth — Database schema, seed data, Django models, authentication (Azure AD + dev bypass), gRPC stubs, UI primitives, layout components, theme system, i18n, and common components.

userStories.title: Database Schema and pgvector Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all 22 database tables created with correct schemas, constraints, and indexes so that the application has a complete data foundation
acceptanceCriteria: All 22 tables created per data-model.md with correct columns, types, FK constraints, CHECK constraints, and indexes
pgvector extension installed, vector columns functional with HNSW indexes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § All 22 tables
Files: services/gateway/apps/authentication/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/gateway/apps/notifications/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/core/apps/ideas/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/core/apps/chat/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/core/apps/board/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/core/apps/brd/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/core/apps/review/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/core/apps/collaboration/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/core/apps/similarity/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/core/apps/admin_config/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/ai/apps/context/migrations/0001_initial.py, services/ai/apps/embedding/migrations/0001_initial.py
Gotchas: pgvector extension before vector columns; partial unique indexes via raw SQL; CHECK constraints at DB level

data_model: users: id uuid PK (AD), email UNIQUE, roles[]

userStories.title: Seed Data
userStories.description: As a developer, I want seed data populated (admin parameters, singleton buckets, dev users) so that the application boots with required configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Admin parameters seeded per data-model.md (application, infrastructure, AI)
Singleton buckets seeded (facilitator_context_bucket, context_agent_bucket)
Dev users seeded conditionally (DEBUG=True only)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § Seed Data
Files: services/core/apps/admin_config/migrations/0002_seed_parameters.py, services/ai/apps/context/migrations/0002_seed_buckets.py, services/gateway/apps/authentication/migrations/0002_seed_dev_users.py
Gotchas: Dev users conditional on DEBUG; singleton buckets enforce single row

data_model: admin_parameters: all defaults from § Seed Data

userStories.title: Gateway Django Models
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Django models for gateway-owned tables (users, notifications, monitoring_alert_configs) so that the gateway service can query and manage its data
acceptanceCriteria: User, Notification, MonitoringAlertConfig models per data-model.md
User model: uuid PK (not auto-generated), ArrayField roles, JSONField email_notification_preferences
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § users, notifications, monitoring_alert_configs
Files: services/gateway/apps/authentication/models.py, services/gateway/apps/notifications/models.py, services/gateway/apps/monitoring/models.py

data_model: users: id uuid PK (no default), roles ArrayField, email_notification_preferences JSONField

userStories.title: Core Django Models
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Django models for core-owned tables (ideas, chat, board, BRD, review, collaboration, similarity tables) so that the core service can manage domain logic
acceptanceCriteria: All 14 core-owned tables have Django models per data-model.md
Immutable models (ChatMessage, BrdVersion, ReviewTimelineEntry) override save() to prevent updates
Partial unique constraints (ReviewAssignment, MergeRequest) via Meta.constraints
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/data-model.md § ideas through merge_requests (14 core tables)
Files: services/core/apps/ideas/models.py, services/core/apps/chat/models.py, services/core/apps/board/models.py, services/core/apps/brd/models.py, services/core/apps/review/models.py, services/core/apps/collaboration/models.py, services/core/apps/similarity/models.py

userStories.title: Authentication Middleware and Dev Bypass
userStories.description: As a developer, I want auth middleware (Azure AD validation + dev bypass mode) and auth endpoints so that users can authenticate and session management works
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/auth/validate validates Azure AD token, syncs user (upsert), syncs roles from AD groups
POST /api/auth/dev-switch switches dev user (double-gated: DEBUG AND AUTH_BYPASS)
Auth middleware validates bearer tokens (REST) and query parameter tokens (WebSocket)
All T-7.1.* and T-7.2.* tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § Authentication; docs/02-architecture/tech-stack.md § Authentication Flow
Testing: docs/04-test-architecture/test-matrix.md § T-7.1.01–T-7.2.03
Files: services/gateway/apps/authentication/middleware.py, services/gateway/apps/authentication/views.py, services/gateway/apps/authentication/urls.py, services/gateway/apps/authentication/serializers.py
Gotchas: Double-gate dev bypass; cache JWKS keys 24h; upsert user sync

test_cases: T-7.1.01: dev endpoint available | T-7.1.02: 404 in prod | T-7.2.01: valid token | T-7.2.02: expired→401 | T-7.2.03: roles synced

userStories.title: gRPC Service Definitions and Stubs
userStories.description: As a developer, I want proto definitions for all gRPC services (gateway↔core, gateway↔ai, gateway↔pdf, gateway↔notification) and generated code so that services can communicate
acceptanceCriteria: All proto files defined (common.proto, core.proto, ai.proto, gateway.proto, pdf.proto)
Python code generated from protos (grpcio-tools)
Stub servicers return valid placeholder responses
Proto compilation succeeds
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/api-design.md § gRPC Services; docs/02-architecture/project-structure.md § proto/
Files: proto/common.proto, proto/core.proto, proto/ai.proto, proto/gateway.proto, proto/pdf.proto, proto/Makefile, services/*/grpc_clients/*.py, services/*/grpc_server/servicers/*.py
Gotchas: Stubs must return valid types (not None); use google.protobuf well-known types

userStories.title: UI Primitive Components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all 16 shadcn/ui components customized with design tokens so that the UI has a consistent foundation
acceptanceCriteria: All 16 components in frontend/src/components/ui/ (Button, Card, Input, Textarea, Select, Switch, Checkbox, Badge, Avatar, Tooltip, DropdownMenu, Dialog, Tabs, Skeleton, Toast, Sheet)
Button: 6 variants, 5 sizes | Badge: state+role variants | Avatar: 4 sizes, initials fallback | Toast: 4 semantic variants
All use CSS variables from design-system.md, render in light/dark mode
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/03-design/design-system.md; docs/03-design/component-specs.md § S1-S17
Files: frontend/src/components/ui/button.tsx (and 15 other files)
Gotchas: Copy-paste shadcn/ui (not npm); Button swaps teal→gold in dark mode; Badge colors match idea state palette

components: Card, Input, Select, Switch, Checkbox, Tooltip, DropdownMenu, Dialog, Tabs, Skeleton, Toast, Sheet

userStories.title: Layout Components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want layout components (Navbar, UserDropdown, PageShell, AuthenticatedLayout, ConnectionIndicator, DevUserSwitcher) so that the app has a consistent navigation structure
acceptanceCriteria: Navbar: CR logo, nav links (role-gated), active gold underline, mobile hamburger
UserDropdown: display name, email, language toggle, theme toggle, logout
ConnectionIndicator: placeholder (green dot + 'Online')
DevUserSwitcher: visible only in dev bypass mode
PageShell: Navbar (sticky) + content | AuthenticatedLayout: layout route with auth guard
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/03-design/design-system.md § Navbar; docs/03-design/page-layouts.md
Files: frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx, NavbarLink.tsx, UserDropdown.tsx, PageShell.tsx, AuthenticatedLayout.tsx, ConnectionIndicator.tsx, frontend/src/components/auth/DevUserSwitcher.tsx
Gotchas: Role-gated links via useAuth(); ConnectionIndicator is placeholder; AuthenticatedLayout redirects if not authenticated

userStories.title: Theme System and i18n Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want CSS variable theming (light/dark) and react-i18next setup (German + English) so that users can switch theme and language
acceptanceCriteria: CSS variables defined (:root light, .dark), theme toggle in UserDropdown, persisted in localStorage, respects prefers-color-scheme
react-i18next configured (de/en), language switcher in UserDropdown, persisted in localStorage
All M1 UI text has translation keys
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/03-design/design-system.md § Color Palette, Design Token Summary
Architecture: docs/02-architecture/tech-stack.md § Theming, User Preference Persistence
Files: frontend/src/app/globals.css, frontend/src/hooks/use-theme.ts, frontend/src/i18n/config.ts, frontend/src/i18n/locales/de.json, frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json
Gotchas: Theme toggle adds/removes 'dark' class on <html>; default language 'de'

userStories.title: Common Components
userStories.description: As a developer, I want common cross-cutting components (ErrorBoundary, EmptyState, ErrorToast shell, ErrorLogModal shell, LoadingSpinner, SkipLink) so that the app has consistent error handling and accessibility
acceptanceCriteria: ErrorBoundary catches errors, displays fallback | EmptyState: icon, message, optional action
ErrorToast/ErrorLogModal shells (UI only, no backend wiring)
LoadingSpinner respects prefers-reduced-motion | SkipLink: sr-only link to main content
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Design: docs/03-design/component-specs.md § ErrorBoundary, EmptyState, LoadingSpinner, SkipLink
Files: frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoundary.tsx, EmptyState.tsx, ErrorToast.tsx, ErrorLogModal.tsx, LoadingSpinner.tsx, SkipLink.tsx
Gotchas: ErrorToast/ErrorLogModal are shells; full wiring in later milestones
